sections.paragraph:
verb לאחות

to stitch together; patch up; combine, join

verb אוחה

be stitched together; patched; joined

verb להתאחות

be stitched together; patched; joined

verb לאחות (>>איחה)

to stitch together; patch up; combine, join

masculine noun

brother, sibling; fellow

masculine noun

nursing man, orderly

masculine and feminine noun

fireplace, hearth, grate, chimney
